What We Do

Landscaping done properly

From a single patio to a complete garden transformation — every job built to last by the same hands, start to finish.

Garden Design

Bespoke designs that make the most of your outdoor space.

Patios & Paving

Porcelain, Indian sandstone and natural stone, laid to last.

Driveways

Block paving and resin drives with proper foundations.

Fencing & Gates

Closeboard, panel and feather-edge fencing built solid.

Turfing & Lawns

Fresh turf and artificial lawns for a year-round finish.

Brickwork & Walling

Garden walls, retaining walls and feature brickwork.

Why Choose Us

The team you’ll be glad you called

No middlemen, no subcontracted shortcuts — just one trusted local team that turns up, does it right and leaves your garden spotless.

  • Built to last

    Proper sub-bases and drainage — not a quick cover-up.

  • Clear pricing

    A detailed written quote before any work begins.

  • Tidy & reliable

    We respect your home, keep you updated and clean up after ourselves.

  • Fully insured

    Comprehensive public liability cover on every project.

Meet The Team

A local name you can trust

Derbyshire Landscaping is a family-run business built on a simple idea: do honest, high-quality work and treat every garden like it’s our own. We’re fully insured, take real pride in a tidy site, and we’re always happy to talk through ideas before you commit to anything.

From the first quote to the final sweep-up, you’ll deal with the same friendly team throughout — no call centres, no sales patter, just proper landscaping done well.

— [Owner Name]Founder, Derbyshire Landscaping
